title: Maanasthan
desc: Deiva, a successful farmer and obedient son, is stunned when his father learns he's not his biological child. Betrayed, his father asks him to leave, leading Deiva on a journey of self-discovery.

title: Joker
desc: An architect falls in love with a woman he sees at a hotel. So, he follows her to her house and pretends to be a caretaker to get closer to her.

title: Thotti Jaya
desc: An orphan named Thotti Jaya is hired by a mobster after he is spotted thrashing a dishonest man. However, his troubles begin when he falls in love with his boss' daughter.

title: Junction
desc: A fun-loving college student falls in love with a girl at first sight. However, things go haywire when another woman falls in love with the same man.

title: Chinna Thambi
desc: After an astrologer predicts that their sister will marry a man of her own choosing, three protective brothers go to dire lengths to prevent the prophecy from being fulfilled.
